items.title: Thomas Tuchel reveals when Elliot Anderson should become Man City player as he gives update on £116m transfer
items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL expects Elliot Anderson’s blockbuster move to Manchester City to be wrapped up before England’s next game at the World Cup. items.summary: Both teams go through in remarkable fashion as Sasa Kalajdzic scores dramatic equaliser that knocks out Iran Today’s match takes place at Kansas City Stadium , home to the Kansas City Chiefs in the NFL. items.summary: Los Angeles date offers Bayern Munich player the chance to heal a wound which opened at this same stadium last March The decoy days are over – apparently. items.title: World Cup last 32 revealed in full as Cristiano Ronaldo and Luka Modric set for last dance in mouthwatering clash
items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO and Luka Modric are set for one final showdown after Portugal and Croatia booked a blockbuster World Cup last-32 clash in Toronto. items.title: Austria survive huge scare to progress with Algeria and knock Iran out
items.summary: Super-sub Sasa Kalajdzic saved Austria's World Cup with a last-gasp equaliser after Algeria had stunned their Group J rivals deep into stoppage time in a thrilling 3-3 draw, which saw both sides progress to the last-32 and Iran knocked out.

items.title: Messi makes more history as Argentina beat Jordan
items.summary: Lionel Messi came off the bench to become the first man to score in seven World Cup games in a row in Argentina’s 3-1 win over Jordan.

items.title: Maestro Messi scores again and breaks another record in the process
items.summary: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to score his sixth goal of the 2026 World Cup as Argentina beat Jordan 3-1 in Dallas and becomes the first player to score in seven World Cup games in a row.

items.title: Colombia denied late winner in enthralling draw with Portugal
items.summary: Colombia and Portugal play out one of the games of the tournament, as both sides qualify for the World Cup last 32 following a gripping 0-0 draw.

items.title: Lo Celso marks his World Cup debut with a fantastic free-kick
items.summary: Giovani Lo Celso scores a fantastic free-kick on his World Cup debut to give Argentina the lead against Jordan.

items.summary: SASA KALAJDZIC's last-gasp header saved Austria's World Cup dream but condemned Iran to miss out on the knockout rounds. items.summary: BRAZIL’s sexiest fan Gabriela Moura took social media by storm as she threatened to burst out of her latest outfit. items.title: Lionel Messi sets incredible new World Cup record as he moves clear in Golden Boot race
items.summary: GREEDY attention-seeker Lionel Messi broke yet another World Cup record. The man who had already played more games and scored more goals in the finals than anyone, can now boast the best streak in tournament history.
